title: trap highlighter
description: This mod simply highlights a block you look and press the default keybind x it turns red look at it again and press x it is removed press  zero 0 to remove all block highlights perfect for activating traps to know where your trap trigger is at.
body: **This mod simply highlights a block you look and press the default keybind x it turns red look at it again and press x it is removed press  zero 0 to remove all block highlights perfect for activating traps to know where your trap trigger is at. It is a good mod to highlight blocks. Happy trapping**
